Join KBTG – where innovation drives impact! With a purposeful mission, collaborative spirit, and a positive attitude, we create fintech solutions that empower. Be part of the future!

Strong teamwork and open communication.

Do you like helping enterprise clients implement innovative cloud solutions and solve technical problems? Do you want to be the leader and demonstrate how emerging technologies (such as AI, Big Data, Cloud, DevOps) can be applied to businesses? Apply now as we are looking for highly motivated Cloud Engineers to help accelerate our growing technical team. This is an excellent opportunity to join a world-class technical team, working with some of the best and brightest engineers and account managers while also developing your skills and furthering your career in one of the most innovative and progressive technology young companies in Thailand.

Responsibilities:

Understand clients’ requirements and design technical solutions on AWS that address clients’ requirements for scalability, reliability, security, and performance.

Work closely and support the sales team from a technical perspective.

Work closely with a team of architects and engineers to create technical documents and proposals.

Conduct proof-of-concept demonstrations, technical presentations, and sharing.

Requirements:

Graduate of Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Computer Engineering, or any IT-related course

With at least 3+ years of relevant experience

Experience designing, building, and maintaining solutions in AWS or GCP or Azure

Architectural knowledge of data center infrastructure including networking, servers, storage infrastructure, and virtualization

Excellent knowledge of CI/CD concepts and tools such as  GitLab ,Ansible,Jenkins

Has experience as a Database Administrator will be an advantage.

Being able to code by Terraform/Cloudformation will be an advantage.

Familiar with containers (Kubernetes, Docker etc.)

Positive attitude and a strong commitment to delivering quality work

Effective communication skills (verbal and written) are preferred.

Strong problem-solving abilities and excellent communication and teamwork skills.

Ability to adapt to new technologies and learn quickly.

Project: Development and Enhancement of Project Peoms 3 (Trading Application)

Job Responsibilities

Design, develop, test, and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services using Java and Spring Framework (Spring Boot / Spring MVC).

Implement system architecture based on Object-Oriented Principles, SOLID principles, and common Design Patterns such as Singleton, Factory, and Strategy.

Develop scalable, maintainable, and clean backend code following best practices and coding standards.

Build and maintain API endpoints, business logic, and system integrations for the trading application.

Collaborate closely with backend, frontend, mobile, and QA teams to deliver high-quality features and system enhancements.

Work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL and SQL Server.

Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize system performance in production environments.

Use development tools such as Bitbucket, Git workflows, and CI/CD pipelines for daily development and collaboration.

Qualifications and Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields

5 years of experience in Java development with Java 8 / 11 / 17

Hands-on experience in RESTful API development using Spring Boot / Spring MVC

Strong understanding of OOP, SOLID principles, and Design Patterns

Experience working with PostgreSQL or SQL Server

Knowledge of Git, branching workflows, and Pull Request processes

Familiarity with JSON, JWT, and authentication/authorization mechanisms

Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment

This role is critical for: 

Building scalable and secure cloud environments. 

Automating deployment and management processes. 

Ensuring high availability of our retail applications. 




Responsibilities:

Cloud Infrastructure;

Design and implement cloud architectures (IaaS/PaaS/SaaS). 

Configure and optimize cloud services (compute, storage, networking).

Automation & DevOps; 

Implement Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM). 

Automate deployment and scaling processes. 

Security & Compliance; 

Implement security best practices and compliance frameworks. 

Monitor and respond to security threats. 

Performance Optimisation; 

Monitor and troubleshoot cloud performance. 

Implement cost optimisation strategies. 


Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor’s in Computer Science, Engineering or related field. 

At lease 3 years experiences in Cloud Engineering or Cloud Infrastructure.

Experienced in Retail/E-Commerce cloud solutions would be a plus advantage.

Skills of Terraform/CloudFormation, CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD).

Programming: Python, Bash, or PowerShell.  

Certification Solution Architect (AWS/GCP/Alibaba Cloud), Azure Administrator (AZ-104) would be great.

Thai Native Speaker with English communication (TOEIC 700+)

At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.

 Could you be the full-time Software Design Engineer in Bangkok we’re looking for?


Your future role

Take on a new challenge and apply your software development expertise in a cutting-edge field. You’ll work alongside innovative and collaborative teammates.

You'll play a key role in ensuring the software meets its functional, safety, and availability targets, contributing to the delivery of high-quality signaling systems for our customers. Day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business, including software architects and hardware designers, to develop and integrate software solutions, and much more.

You’ll specifically take care of designing and coding software components, as well as testing and verifying deliverables, but also contribute to continuous improvement initiatives and standardization efforts.

We’ll look to you for:

Collaborating with the software architect to elaborate software specifications and architecture

Developing and coding software components

Setting up the software development toolchain

Specifying, designing, preparing, and performing tests and verifications of deliverables

Managing software work products under configuration management

Supporting software and hardware integration

Contributing to the sustainability and maintenance of software

Staying informed about technological advancements through a technology watch

Implementing reusable solutions, including Commercial Off-The-Shelf (COTS) products

Applying processes and standards

Driving continuous improvement initiatives


All about you

We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

Bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field

At least 3 years’ experience in software development

Experience in software development using C/C++

Knowledge of Linux, networking, and protocols

Familiarity with script languages and shell utilities

Experience using tools such as Git, GitLab, or PC-Lint (optional)

Experience in formulating subsystem requirements and technical writing

Experience in vital or secure software development is an additional advantage

Experience in the railway domain is an additional advantage


Things you’ll enjoy Join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also:

Enjoy stability, challenges, and a long-term career free from monotonous routines

Work with new security standards for rail signaling

Collaborate with diverse and supportive colleagues

Contribute to innovative and impactful projects

Utilize our flexible and inclusive working environment

Steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

Benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning opportunities

Progress towards senior roles within the company

Benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognizes your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)

SAP HR / SuccessFactors Consultant

We are seeking an experienced SAP HR - SuccessFactors Consultant to lead the design and delivery of digital HR transformation solutions across enterprise environments. This role is ideal for professionals with strong functional expertise in SAP HCM and/or SuccessFactors, combined with leadership and consulting capabilities.

Key Responsibilities

Analyze business requirements and design end-to-end HR solutions using SAP HCM / SuccessFactors

Provide expert consulting on core HR, talent management, performance, payroll, and employee lifecycle processes

Lead implementation and configuration of SAP HCM and/or SuccessFactors modules

Manage work planning, task delegation, and delivery timelines

Monitor progress and ensure high-quality, on-time delivery

Drive issue resolution and provide effective solutions to complex challenges

Ensure solution quality and alignment with best practices

Oversee integration with other SAP modules and external HR systems

Lead and mentor team members, supporting capability development

Engage stakeholders through effective communication, reporting, and presentations

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Human Resources, Business Administration, or related fields

Minimum 5 years of experience in SAP HCM and/or SuccessFactors implementation

At least 3 years of experience in a team lead or senior consultant role

Proven experience in full-cycle SAP implementation projects

Strong ability to manage multiple workstreams and priorities

Good command of English (spoken and written)

SAP SuccessFactors Certification is a strong advantage

Strong leadership and team management skills

Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities

Strong presentation and negotiation skills

Solid business acumen and consulting mindset

About Us

SKY Group is a leading provider of advanced technology solutions, delivering intelligent innovations that enhance the quality of life and drive operational excellence.

Our expertise includes airport technologies, digital platforms, project management, and advanced security and facility management systems.

We are committed to creating smart, value-driven solutions for both government and private sector clients

Our Data & Analytics Team drives data insights to support business decisions and reflect key business performance across the enterprise. We deliver operational ,managerial reports and self-service datasets to Manufacturing Supply Chain, and Finance users.

With the strategic SAP S/4HANA implementation underway in Vietnam, we will utilize the new ERP's master and transactional data to establish business reporting, and we are now seeking a Business Analyst to support below activities.




Key Responsibilities

The Business Analyst will act as a key liaison between the business and technical teams, driving the successful delivery of data products.

Business Requirements Elicitation: Collaborate closely with business stakeholders (Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Finance) to thoroughly understand requirements, define the associated business value, and precisely identify the data needed for business dashboards and self-service datasets.

Requirement Prioritization: Prioritization business requirements and dashboard features to ensure maximum business impact and alignment with strategic objectives.

Ensure requirement with Data Availability: Partner with Data Analysts and SAP Business Analysts to identify required data fields, validate data sources (especially within SAP S/4HANA), and ensure high data quality and availability for reporting.

Design & User Experience: Design professional dashboard mock-ups and wireframes, focusing on intuitive, user-friendly design and ease-of-use (UX/UI).

Solution Development & Delivery: Work alongside Analytical Engineers to facilitate the development, testing, and deployment of high-value dashboards and self-service datasets.

Provide Test Cases: Define comprehensive test cases and coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to ensure the delivered solution meets all specified business requirements.




Qualifications:

Experience: Minimum of 3 years of experience as a Business Analyst within the Manufacturing industry, with a focus on Supply Chain and Finance domains.

Technical Acumen: Strong proficiency in SQL for data querying and analysis.

SAP Experience: Prior working experience with SAP S/4HANA (MM,FI/CO) master and transactional data is a significant advantage.

Communication & Analysis: Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with a proven ability to gather complex business requirements and accurately translate them into technical data needs.

Data Visualization: Demonstrated ability to translate complex business use cases and functional requirements into effective data visualization prototypes.

Documentation: Proficiency in creating detailed requirements documents, user stories, use cases, and functional specifications.

Language Skills: Good command of both Thai and English communication (verbal and written).

Qualifications:

1. At least Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, BBA or related fields.

2. At least 2 years experience as Data analyst or related fields.

3. Prerequisites include speaking English fluently.

4. Able to use Power BI.

5. Those with relevant marine, shipping or logistics experience will be advantaged  




Responsibilities : -

1. Update technical information from the Flag Administration, Class Society, and manufacturers, gathering data and entering it into the operation system of the ship (e.g., PMS, ROMs, PBI).

2. Combine vessel performance data (fuel consumption, engine characteristics) as needed by TS/FM.

3. Compile and synthesize case studies, mishaps, and malfunctions involving the fleet’s vessels.

4. For financial planning purposes, help TS/FM get and collect the cost of spare parts from buyers.

5. Set up technical meetings and generate minutes for them.

6. As needed, collaborate with the relevant departments on Flag Administration matters and offer assistance with administrative duties that have not been addressed before.

Job_Title: Senior IT Sales/ Account Manager (System Integration)
Full_Description:
Responsibilities :


Develop and execute sales strategies to target large-scale enterprise organizations within specific sectors, e.g., FSI (Financial Services Institute), Insurance, healthcare, manufacturing.

Establish and nurture strong relationships with key decision-makers at enterprise-level clients.

Identify and articulate the value proposition of our IT solutions to address complex enterprise challenges.

Manage the entire sales process from lead generation to contract negotiation and closure.

Prepare tailored proposals, presentations, and demonstrations to showcase our capabilities and address customer needs.

Ensure customer satisfaction throughout the sales cycle and post-sale.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., product, engineering, marketing) to deliver exceptional customer experiences.




Requirements:


Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

Minimum of 3 years of experience in enterprise sales, system integration, preferably within the IT industry.

Proven track record of successfully closing large-scale deals with enterprise clients.

Deep understanding of enterprise IT landscapes, industry trends, and competitive dynamics.

Strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

Ability to build rapport and trust with C-level executives.

Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).

Native Thai speaker with good English proficiency is MANDATORY

About the Company

Thanes Group, a family-owned business of the Thanesvorakul family, is a leading medical technology company with over 40 years of experience advancing healthcare innovation. With partnerships spanning more than 50 global technology firms—including Panasonic, Yuyama, and SenseTime, the company has served over 1,000 hospitals across Thailand. Thanes Group is transforming from a distributor to a full-fledged MedTech provider, developing in-house solutions in hospital automation, AI, and smart systems for diagnosis, labs, and pharmacies. The company’s mission is to turn every hospital in Thailand into a “Smart Hospital,” combining high-quality products, intelligent systems, and exceptional service to elevate patient care.

Job_Title: Project Manager Lead (หัวหน้าทีมบริหารโครงการ)
Full_Description:
Project Manager Lead




ตำแหน่งนี้ไม่ใช่ Project Manager Leadทั่วไป

ในยุคที่ AI สามารถสร้าง spec, wireframe และ report ได้ในไม่กี่นาที

คุณค่าของ PM ไม่ได้อยู่ที่ “การผลิตเอกสาร” อีกต่อไป

บทบาทของคุณคือ:

👉 ตัดสินใจว่า “อะไรควรสร้าง” และ “ควรสร้างอย่างไร”

👉 ภายใต้ข้อมูลที่ไม่ครบ และบริบทที่ซับซ้อน

👉 ไม่ใช่แค่ผู้ที่ประสานงานให้ทีมสร้างตามที่ถูกบอก

 คุณจะเป็นผู้นำทีม PMO (PM, UX/UI, BA, CS)

และออกแบบการทำงานให้ AI เป็น default workflow ของทุกโครงการ 




รูปแบบการทำงาน: Hybrid work (WFH 1 Day/Week)

สถานที่ทำงาน : สำนักงานบางนา หรือ สำนักงานย่อยลาดพร้าว

ช่วง Probation จำเป็นต้องเข้าปฏิบัติงานที่สำนักงานบางนา




ความรับผิดชอบหลัก (Core Responsibilities)

1.  Judgment & Decision-Making

Judgment : ตัดสินใจว่า "อะไรควรสร้าง" และ "อะไรไม่ควรสร้าง" โดยอิงจากบริบทของลูกค้าที่ AI เข้าไม่ถึง

Context Over Technicality: รู้ว่าเมื่อไหร่ควรเชื่อ AI และเมื่อไหร่ควร Override เพราะ "ความถูกต้องทางเทคนิค" ไม่เท่ากับ "ความถูกต้องตามบริบทธุรกิจ"

Second-order Effects: มองข้ามช็อตว่าการเปลี่ยน Feature หนึ่งอย่างจะกระทบระบบภาพรวมอย่างไร

Decision-Making :กล้าตัดสินใจเมื่อข้อมูลไม่ครบ 100% 

2. Specification Precision (The Art of Directing AI)

Unambiguous Intent: แปลงความต้องการที่คลุมเครือจากลูกค้าให้เป็น Specification ที่ชัดเจนระดับที่ AI Agents ทำงานต่อได้ทันทีโดยไม่ต้องถามซ้ำ (แปลง requirement ที่คลุมเครือจากลูกค้าให้เป็น unambiguous, machine-readable intent)

Constraint-Based Thinking: ระบุ "ข้อห้าม" ให้ชัดเจนพอๆ กับ "สิ่งที่ต้องทำ" คาดการณ์จุดที่ AI จะ Hallucinate หรือไปต่อไม่ได้ ล่วงหน้า

3. AI-Native Workflow Design

Systematic Workflows: ออกแบบกระบวนการทำงานที่ใช้ AI เป็นขั้นตอนแรก (First-step) และเป็น Default ไม่ใช่ขั้นตอนสุดท้าย หรือ ใช้ AI เสริมการทำงาน

Quality Gates: สร้าง Prompt Templates และ Evaluation Checklists ที่ทีม (PM, UX/UI, BA, CS) สามารถนำไปใช้ซ้ำเพื่อลดเวลาและข้อผิดพลาดอย่างเป็นรูปธรรม

Efficiency Benchmarking: กำหนดและวัดผล KPI ด้านประสิทธิภาพที่เกิดจากการใช้ AI (เช่น Lead Time Reduction, Error Rate) เพื่อปรับปรุง Workflow ให้ดียิ่งขึ้นอย่างต่อเนื่อง

Hybrid Governance: แยกแยะชัดเจนว่าจุดใดใน Workflow ที่ AI ทำได้ 100% และจุดใดที่ต้องมี "Human-in-the-loop" เพื่อตรวจสอบความถูกต้องขั้นสุดท้าย

4. Taste & Critical Evaluation

The Bar Raiser: ตรวจจับ AI Hallucinations และ Output ที่ "ดูดีแต่ผิดบริบท" ได้อย่างแม่นยำ

Specific Feedback: ให้ Feedback ที่เฉียบคม (เช่น "Optimize ผิด Metric" หรือ "ขาด Political Dynamics") ไม่ใช่แค่คำสั่งกว้างๆ ว่า "ไปปรับมาใหม่"

5. Team Coaching & Portfolio Delivery

Continuous Learning Velocity: นำทีมให้ Update ทักษะ AI ทุก 4-6 เดือน และสร้างวัฒนธรรม High Agency (ลงมือทำทันที ไม่รอสั่ง)

Modern Delivery: บริหารโครงการภาครัฐ/เอกชนให้จบตาม Scope/Time/Budget โดยใช้ AI ทำ Forecasting และ Resource Planning แทนการทำ Report มือ

ประสานงานข้ามทีม (Dev, Sales, ลูกค้า, Vendors) ใช้ AI ช่วย summarize, track action items, flag risks อัตโนมัติ

สร้างกำไรให้บริษัท เข้าใจ cost structure, margin, และ AI cost-benefit analysis







คุณสมบัติที่เรามองหา (Qualifications)

ประสบการณ์ 5+ ปี ด้านบริหารโครงการซอฟต์แวร์, 3+ ปี ในบทบาท Team Lead หรือ PMO

มี track record ของการ ตัดสินใจที่ส่งผลกระทบต่อธุรกิจ — ไม่ใช่แค่ส่งมอบตาม spec

เข้าใจ SDLC, Agile/Scrum และ รู้ว่าเมื่อไหร่ควรทิ้ง framework แล้วใช้ judgment แทน

ประสบการณ์บริหารโครงการทั้งภาครัฐและเอกชน

มีประสบการณ์ใช้ AI tools “ในงานจริง”

สามารถเขียน prompt ที่ได้ผลลัพธ์ที่ใช้งานได้จริง

 สามารถ ตรวจจับ AI hallucination และ bias

เข้าใจ capability และ limitation ของ AI ปัจจุบัน

Coaching และ Mentor ทีมที่หลากหลาย (PM, UX/UI, BA, CS)

สร้างวัฒนธรรมทีมที่เน้น judgment, learning velocity, และ accountability

 บริหารทรัพยากรให้เกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด

ทักษะสื่อสาร นำเสนอ เจรจาต่อรอง แก้ไขปัญหาซับซ้อน

สามารถทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดันและความเปลี่ยนแปลง







พิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

 เคย build หรือ direct AI agents/workflows ในงานจริง (ไม่ใช่แค่ใช้ chatbot)

มี track record วัดผล AI impact ได้ (productivity, cost saving, quality improvement)

ใบรับรอง PMP, PMI-ACP, CSM, SAFe หรือเทียบเท่า

 ใบรับรอง ISO Lead Auditor

ประสบการณ์ด้าน prompt engineering, AI evaluation, หรือ agent orchestration

 เคยสร้าง systematic AI workflows ที่ทีมอื่นใช้ซ้ำได้

ทำไมตำแหน่งนี้ถึงน่าสนใจ

คุณจะได้ shape วิธีการทำงานของทั้งบริษัท ในยุคที่ทุกอย่างกำลังเปลี่ยน

 ทำงานกับโครงการทั้งภาครัฐและเอกชน — หลากหลาย ไม่ซ้ำซาก

 บริษัทกำลัง invest ใน AI อย่างจริงจัง — ไม่ใช่แค่ buzzword ใน JD

 มีโอกาสสร้าง AI-native PMO ตั้งแต่ต้น — ไม่ใช่ patch ระบบเก่า

สิ่งที่เราไม่ได้มองหา

คนที่ยังคิดว่า AI เป็น "เครื่องมือเสริม" — ที่นี่ AI เป็น default ไม่ใช่ option

คนที่วัดผลตัวเองด้วย "จำนวน meeting ที่เข้า" — เราวัดด้วย decision quality และ delivery outcome

คนที่ต้องการข้อมูลครบ 100% ก่อนตัดสินใจ — ในโลก AI ข้อมูลจะไม่มีวันครบ คุณต้องกล้าตัดสิน

คนที่ "ส่งเสริมการใช้ AI" แต่ตัวเองไม่ใช้ — Lead by example ไม่ใช่ lead by memo

About Agoda 

Agoda is an online travel booking platform for accommodations, flights, and more. We build and deploy cutting-edge technology that connects travelers with a global network of 4.7M hotels and holiday properties worldwide, plus flights, activities, and more. Based in Asia and part of Booking Holdings, our 7,100+ employees representing 95+ nationalities in 27 markets foster a work environment rich in diversity, creativity, and collaboration. We innovate through a culture of experimentation and ownership, enhancing the ability for our customers to experience the world.

Our Purpose - Bridging the World Through Travel 

We believe travel allows people to enjoy, learn and experience more of the amazing world we live in. It brings individuals and cultures closer together, fostering empathy, understanding and happiness.
We are a skillful, driven and diverse team from across the globe, united by a passion to make an impact. Harnessing our innovative technologies and strong partnerships, we aim to make travel easy and rewarding for everyone.

Get to Know our Team: 

The Security Department oversees security, compliance, GRC, and security operations for all Agoda. We are vigilant in ensuring there is no breach or vulnerability threatening our company or endangering our employees in order to keep Agoda safe and protected. This would be a great challenge for those who want to work with the best technology in a dynamic and advanced environment.

This role is a 6-month contract based in Bangkok, Thailand and the succeeded candidate will be assigned to the project.

The Opportunity:

You will be working with a diverse group of expert security professionals from different parts of the world, pooling in years of experience in securing software products and corporate environments.

In this Role, you'll get to: 

Help triage and track security findings, and collaborate with various teams to ensure timely remediation.

Participate in code reviews, vulnerability assessments, and penetration testing under the guidance of senior analysts.

Research and analyze the impact of security issues and help design strategies to minimize risk.

Get hands-on experience with industry-standard security tools and platforms.

Work with the team to understand how security integrates into CI/CD pipelines and modern cloud environments.

What you’ll need to succeed:

Bachelor’s degree in IT or related fields

Fresh graduates are welcome to apply. Preferably less than two years of experience.

Familiar with basic programming

Security and risk mindset

Good English communication skill

Ready to learn fast

It's Great if you have:

Practical knowledge or experience in performing security assessments and vulnerability management

Built some back-end applications and services.

Familiarity with OWASP Top 10 and other security frameworks

Job_Title: IT Support / เจ้าหน้าที่ไอที
Full_Description:
ตำแหน่ง: IT Support / เจ้าหน้าที่ไอที
บริษัทกำลังมองหาบุคลากรในตำแหน่ง IT Support เพื่อเข้ามารับผิดชอบดูแลและสนับสนุนระบบภายในองค์กรให้สามารถดำเนินงานได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพและต่อเนื่อง

หน้าที่ และ ความรับผิดชอบ

ให้การสนับสนุนและแก้ไขปัญหาด้าน IT แก่พนักงานภายในองค์กร Hardware และ Software, Cloud Service, MS365, Endpoint

ดูแลระบบ network และการเชื่อมต่อให้มีเสถียรภาพ (Gateway, Firewall, VPN, Wifi)

ดูแลและบริหารจัดการระบบ Server และ Backup System เพื่อให้ข้อมูลมีความปลอดภัยและสามารถกู้คืนได้เมื่อเกิดปัญหา

ติดตาม ตรวจสอบ และบำรุงรักษาระบบคอมพิวเตอร์และอุปกรณ์ต่างๆ (Preventive and Corrective Maintenance)

ประสานงานกับผู้ให้บริการภายนอก (Vendor) ในกรณีที่ต้องมีการแก้ไขหรือปรับปรุงระบบ

ทักษะ คุณสมบัติ และประสบการณ์:

วุฒิการศึกษา ปริญญาตรี สาขาวิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์ เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์ในงานดูแลระบบคอมพิวเตอร์ IT Support, System Administrator และเครือข่าย อย่างน้อย 3-5 ปี

มีความรู้ความเข้าใจด้านระบบ Network, Server, Firewall และ IT Infrastructure

มีทักษะในการวิเคราะห์และแก้ไขปัญหา (Troubleshooting) ได้เป็นอย่างดี

มีความสามารถในการสื่อสารและให้คำปรึกษาแนะนำในภาษาที่เข้าใจง่ายได้เป็นอย่างดี

มีมนุษยสัมพันธ์ดี สามารถสื่อสารและให้บริการผู้ใช้งานได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีความรับผิดชอบสูง และสามารถทำงานด้วยตัวเองได้

มีความละเอียดรอบคอบ สามารถแก้ไขปัญหาเฉพาะหน้าได้ดี




⭐ คุณสมบัติพิเศษ (จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)

มีความรู้หรือประสบการณ์ด้าน Programming (เช่น Python, PHP, หรือภาษาอื่นๆ)

มีความเข้าใจเกี่ยวกับ Database (เช่น MS SQL, SQL Server หรืออื่นๆ)

หากไม่มีประสบการณ์ด้าน Programming หรือ Database บริษัทมีโอกาสให้พัฒนาและเรียนรู้เพิ่มเติม

ถ้า สนใจที่จะ พัฒนาตัวเอง ด้าน iOT, Agentic Ai, PLC Programming, Web App จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

Full_Description:
Job Purpose:

To manage the end-to-end delivery of DCIM (Data Center Infrastructure Management) and BMS (Building Management System) solutions within data center construction projects, ensuring the systems are designed, installed, tested, and commissioned in accordance with operational needs, design intent, and industry best practices. The role plays a critical part in enabling efficient, reliable, and real-time management of all data center facilities.


Key Responsibilities:

1. System Design & Review

Review and validate the design of DCIM/BMS systems, ensuring compliance with operational requirements, industry standards (e.g., ASHRAE, ISO/IEC), and the project’s performance criteria.

Coordinate with MEP engineers, IT/Network teams, design consultants, and vendors to integrate BMS/DCIM seamlessly with all facility systems (power, cooling, fire, security, etc.).

Participate in solution architecture design for system scalability, redundancy, and integration with third-party platforms (e.g., CMMS, EMS, PMS, NMS).

2. Installation & Integration Oversight

Supervise the installation of all DCIM/BMS components including sensors, controllers, gateways, and workstations.

Ensure proper cable routing, device placement, and network configuration.

Manage system interface and integration testing between BMS/DCIM and subsystems (e.g., UPS, CRAC, generator, chillers).

3. Testing & Commissioning

Lead and coordinate factory acceptance testing (FAT), site acceptance testing (SAT), and integrated system testing (IST) for DCIM and BMS platforms.

Validate sensor data accuracy, alarm thresholds, system responsiveness, and interface usability.

Ensure final commissioning supports real-time visibility and actionable insights for operations teams.

4. Quality Assurance & System Performance

Ensure systems are configured to support proactive monitoring, alerting, capacity planning, and energy efficiency analysis.

Conduct system audits and quality inspections during project execution to meet project SLAs and operational KPIs.

Ensure cybersecurity standards are upheld in network-connected BMS/DCIM environments.

5. Documentation & Handover

Ensure complete and accurate documentation of system architecture, points lists, device addressing, configuration files, and SOPs.

Facilitate end-user training for operations and maintenance teams.

Support transition to steady-state operations with post-handover support and troubleshooting.

Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, Automation, Computer Engineering, or a related field.

Minimum 5–7 years of experience in BMS/DCIM systems for mission-critical facilities or data centers.

Strong knowledge of BMS systems (e.g., Schneider EcoStruxure, Siemens Desigo, Honeywell, Johnson Controls) and DCIM platforms (e.g., Nlyte, Sunbird, StruxureWare, Trellis).

Familiarity with communication protocols: Modbus, BACnet, SNMP, OPC, etc.

Experience with T&C processes and working with commissioning agents or 3rd party verifiers.

Understanding of facility operations, MEP infrastructure, and IT network topology.

Key Competencies:

Technical proficiency in systems integration and data center operational monitoring.

Strong project coordination and vendor management skills.

Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

High attention to detail and commitment to quality and uptime.

Strong documentation and communication capabilities.

Able to frequently travel and stay-over at others city beside than Bangkok (Chonburi/Rayong)

Office Location: Bangkokland, Muangthong Thani, Nonthaburi

Full_Description:
THE ROLE

We are looking for a technically skilled and client-focused professional to join our B2B connectivity team as a Client API Connectivity Manager. In this role, you will be the primary technical point of contact for our global distribution partners — including travel agencies, OTAs, and tour operators — ensuring seamless integration with our hotel API platform.

You will own the full connectivity lifecycle: from onboarding new partners through to ongoing performance optimization and issue resolution. Working cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Sales, and Reservations teams, you will play a critical role in maximizing partner success, reducing friction, and driving incremental booking revenue.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Partner Onboarding & Integration

•     Guide new B2B partners through end-to-end API integration, from initial setup and credentials through to full production go-live.

•     Conduct technical kick-off sessions, provide sandbox access, and validate test scenarios before live deployment.

•     Maintain and continuously improve onboarding documentation, integration guides, and API reference materials.




Technical Support & Issue Resolution

•     Act as the primary technical escalation point for API-related issues including error codes, rate/inventory discrepancies, booking and cancellation failures, and performance degradation.

•     Manage support tickets across email, calls, and chat with a commitment to timely, high-quality resolution.

•     Reproduce and diagnose issues using Postman, log analysis, and SQL queries; coordinate fixes with Engineering where required.


API Performance Monitoring & Optimization

•     Monitor daily API health metrics including uptime, request success rates, response times, and data quality indicators.

•     Proactively identify performance bottlenecks and recommend optimization strategies to improve partner conversion and reduce error rates.

•     Leverage SQL, Excel, and internal analytics tooling to produce regular performance insights and trend analysis.




Partner Success & Relationship Management

•     Conduct regular review calls with key partners to present performance reports, discuss roadblocks, and align on improvement plans.

•     Identify commercial opportunities within partner integrations — including expanding inventory usage, improving search-to-book ratios, and reducing abandonment.

•     Collaborate with Account Management and Sales teams to surface technical insights that support retention and upsell conversations.


Internal Collaboration & Enablement

•     Work closely with Product and Engineering teams to communicate partner feedback, validate bug fixes, and prioritize feature development.

•     Train internal account managers and external partners on effective API usage and best practices.

•     Contribute to the development of technical FAQs, training materials, and knowledge base content.




REQUIREMENTS

Essential

•     Solid working knowledge of REST APIs, HTTP protocols, XML/JSON data formats, and authentication standards (OAuth, API keys).

•     Proficiency with diagnostic and analysis tools: Postman, SQL (query writing and log analysis), and Excel and other related diagnostic tools

•     Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to isolate root causes across complex, multi-system integrations

•     Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

•     Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple client accounts and priorities simultaneously.




Advantageous

•     Experience with hotel bed banks, wholesale distribution platforms, or similar travel supply systems (e.g. rates, inventory, content feeds).

•     3–8 years of experience in API support, technical integration, or technical account management — travel or hospitality technology strongly preferred.

•     Python scripting for data analysis or automation.

•     Familiarity with API monitoring tools, dashboards, or alerting systems.

•     Experience delivering partner training or technical enablement programs.




Education

Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, or a related technical field (Highly recommended based on technical requirements ).

About the job

Google isn't just a software company. The Hardware Operations team is responsible for monitoring the state-of-the-art physical infrastructure behind Google's powerful search technology. As a Hardware Operations Manager, you will manage a team of Data Center Technicians. You will oversee the quality installation of server hardware and components and take charge of complicated installations/troubleshooting.

Your team will install, configure, test, troubleshoot and maintain hardware (like servers and its components) and server software (like Google's Linux cluster). They will also take on the configuration of more complex components such as networks, routers, hubs, bridges, switches and networking protocols. They may lead small project teams on larger installations and develop project contingency plans.

In this role, you will lead a team of Data Center Technicians who perform quality installations of server and network hardware and their components, and maintain and troubleshoot any tests while modeling teamwork with a positive impact to site culture. You will also manage day-to-day operations and guide the team through the installation, configuration, testing, troubleshooting and decommissioning of our servers. In a similar fashion, you will also oversee the deployment of network components of the data center, lead teams on installations and develop project contingency plans.

We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.

We're the driving team behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

Title: Full-Stack Engineer

Build the infrastructure powering the next generation of workplace food services.

Ola Delivery is a food delivery platform powered by a zone-based delivery model, where meals from multiple restaurants are consolidated at a centralized pickup hub before being delivered to offices. This enables multi-restaurant ordering, faster delivery times, and significantly lower delivery costs.

If you want to build a real platform used daily by companies and thousands of employees, this is your opportunity.

We are looking for a Full-Stack Engineer to lead the development of the Ola Delivery platform.

You will design system architecture, build backend APIs, manage deployment pipelines, and develop both the customer ordering applications and internal management dashboards.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems from the ground up, solving operational problems, and owning the entire product lifecycle—from architecture to production monitoring.

You will work closely with the founder to design a scalable platform capable of serving thousands of daily food orders across multiple offices and restaurants.




What You’ll Do

System Architecture

Design and maintain scalable system architecture for the Ola Delivery platform, ensuring high reliability and performance as the platform scales.

Backend Development

Build and maintain backend services and APIs powering the ordering platform, restaurant integrations, delivery workflows, and company dashboards.

API Development

Design secure and efficient REST APIs used by:

Customer mobile applications

Restaurant partner systems

Internal operations dashboards

Delivery logistics services

Web Platform Development

Develop and maintain the internal operations and management dashboard used by restaurants, administrators, and corporate clients.

Cloud Infrastructure

Deploy and manage the platform on AWS, including infrastructure configuration, scaling, and monitoring.

CI/CD Management

Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure reliable automated testing, builds, and deployments.

Production Operations

Monitor and maintain production environments, troubleshoot issues, and ensure high system availability.

Testing & Quality Assurance

Implement automated testing and maintain system reliability through unit testing, integration testing, and production monitoring.




Technical Environment

Backend API services

Cloud infrastructure (AWS)

CI/CD automation

Web management dashboards

Mobile ordering applications




Qualifications

Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

Experience building and shipping production-grade applications

Backend Development

Strong experience developing backend APIs

Experience designing scalable system architectures

Cloud Infrastructure

Experience deploying and managing applications on AWS

CI/CD

Experience building CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment workflows

Full-Stack Development

Ability to develop both backend services and frontend interfaces

Mobile Development

Experience working with mobile applications or mobile frameworks

Software Engineering Skills

Strong debugging and problem-solving abilities

Ability to write maintainable, production-ready code

Experience maintaining systems in live production environments

Nice to Have

Experience building marketplace platforms

Experience with food delivery or logistics platforms

Experience with high-volume transaction systems

Familiarity with real-time order processing systems

Experience working in early-stage startups



Why Join Ola Delivery

You will be part of the core founding engineering team, building the technology behind a platform designed to transform the food delivery industry.

This is an opportunity to build a real operational system used daily by companies and employees, while helping shape the technology foundation of a growing startup.

Technical Leadership – 50% (Web App + Mobile App with Golang + React + PostgreSQL)

Team & Project Management – 30% (cross-functional product development teams)

Key Responsibilities

·        Shape and execute product and platform strategy for large‑scale digital learning solutions.

·        Design scalable, secure architecture using Golang (backend), React (frontend), PostgreSQL database, and Flutter/Native iOS for mobile.

·        Champion modern engineering practices — CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, and agile DevOps culture.

·        Drive AI‑first, data‑driven approaches for personalization and learner analytics.

 

2. Leadership & Delivery Management

·        Collaborate closely with Product and Academic teams to ensure alignment between pedagogy, user experience, and technology outcomes.

3. Coaching, Learning, and Academic Integration

·        Mentor and upskill tech team members through training sessions, code reviews, and internal workshops.

·        (Preferred) Experience as a Product Owner in digital product development or EdTech.

·        (Plus) Passion for teaching, experience designing a training platform, or conducting instructor‑led training.

  

Qualifications

·        15+ years in technology or product development, with 7+ years leading multi‑disciplinary tech teams.

·        Proven record in delivering high‑traffic, scalable digital products (web + mobile).

·        Hands‑on expertise in Golang, React, and PostgreSQL.

·        Strong understanding of software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and system scalability.

·        Experience integrating AI or data‑driven analytics into products is a strong plus.

·        Familiarity with EdTech, LMS, or digital learning environments preferred.

·        Excellent strategic thinking, problem‑solving, and stakeholder communication skills.

·        Self‑motivated leader who values innovation, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning.

"Work Where Wow, Happens Every Day"

Advanced knowledge of Linux system administration, including user management, process control, performance tuning, and troubleshooting.

Solid understanding of networking fundamentals, including routing, DNS, firewall, and cloud network security concepts.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot complex platform issues.

Job Title: AI Engineer – Manager

Department: PwC Digital

Job summary

As an AI Engineer – Manager within PwC Thailand’s Digital team, you will lead the design, development, and deployment of intelligent systems that transform business processes and deliver measurable value to our clients. Collaborating with cross-functional teams and AI experts globally, you will drive the adoption of advanced AI solutions across various lines of services including Assurance, Tax, Deals, Consulting, ensuring alignment with best practices and PwC’s strategic objectives. You will play an essential role in PwC’s ongoing success, helping the firm maintain its leadership in artificial intelligence through your innovation and expertise.

Key Responsibilities

·       AI Solution Development: Lead the end-to-end lifecycle of AI solutions, from ideation and design through to deployment and ongoing support.

·       Stakeholder Engagement: Communicate complex AI concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders and clients, ensuring alignment with business needs.

·       Technical Excellence: Apply prompt engineering techniques, optimise AI model performance, develop machine learning models, build agentic AI systems, and leverage AI platforms such as Microsoft Copilot Studio.

·       Best Practices: Ensure AI solutions are scalable, secure, maintainable, and ethically compliant, staying abreast of emerging technologies and industry standards.

·       AI Expertise: Stay current with latest AI technologies and apply appropriate advancements into the team’s practices.

Qualifications:

·       Bachelor’s, Master’s, or PhD in artificial intelligence, machine learning, data science, computer science, computer engineering, or a related discipline.

·       At least seven years’ direct experience in AI or machine learning development, ideally in a business environment.

·       Proven record designing, deploying, and supporting AI solutions for commercial clients.

·       Experience managing complex projects and working with cross-functional teams. Consulting experience is advantageous.

Required technical skills:

·       Proficiency with machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, JAX).

·       Strong software development skills in languages such as Python, JavaScript, or R.

·       Experience with Azure cloud and AI services (e.g., Azure AI services, Azure DevOps, Azure Functions, Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric), as well as familiarity with other cloud platforms.

·       Solid understanding of data engineering principles, tools, and big data technologies, with experience building data pipelines on Azure and awareness of alternative options.

·       Knowledge of natural language processing and computer vision techniques is a plus.

·       Experience in multi-agent systems and collaborative AI is a plus.

Soft skills:

·       Excellent problem-solving and analytical abilities.

·       Effective communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.

·       Demonstrated leadership, mentoring, or team management experience.

·       Highly adaptable, with a continuous learning mindset and the ability to thrive in a dynamic environment.

About the role

Atiom is rebuilding its core application in Flutter, and we’re looking for the person who will architect and lead that transformation.

This is not a UI-focused Flutter role. This is a high-ownership frontend architecture position.

You will design and build the next generation of our app: one shared Flutter codebase powering iOS, Android, Web, Windows, and macOS.

The backend remains. The product logic remains. The visual identity evolves.

Your job is to rebuild it cleanly, correctly, and sustainably, and then own it long-term as the product continues to grow.

Your Mission

Re-architect and rebuild our existing production application in Flutter, establishing a scalable frontend foundation that supports years of future development.

You will define the frontend architecture from the ground up and serve as the long-term technical owner of the client application.

Your Mission

Re-architect and rebuild our existing production application in Flutter, establishing a scalable frontend foundation that supports years of future development.

You will define the frontend architecture from the ground up and serve as the long-term technical owner of the client application.

What You’ll Own
Architecture & Technical Direction

Define the complete Flutter frontend architecture

Choose and implement state management strategy

Design navigation structure and routing approach

Establish modular project organization and layering

Define dependency injection and data flow patterns

Set coding standards and structural conventions

Design a pragmatic and maintainable testing strategy

The Rebuild

Analyze the existing production app deeply

Recreate functionality

Maintain feature parity while improving internal structure

Ensure clean integration with existing REST APIs

Implement multi-language support

Deliver consistent cross-platform behavior (mobile, web, desktop)

Performance & Quality

Ensure smooth runtime performance and frame stability

Optimize startup time and rendering behavior

Maintain clean memory and state handling practices

Establish quality standards that prevent long-term technical debt

Long-Term Ownership

Continue building new features after the rebuild

Improve and evolve the architecture as the product grows

Potentially mentor or hire additional Flutter developers

Collaborate with backend, product, and design teams


What We’re Looking For:

Experience

7+ years of frontend engineering experience

3+ years of production-level Flutter experience

Proven experience building complex, API-driven applications

Experience in structuring medium-to-large scale frontend codebases

Strongly Preferred

Multi-platform Flutter experience (mobile + web and/or desktop)

Experience making architectural decisions independently

Experience improving or refactoring legacy systems

Familiarity with modern AI-assisted development workflows

Fluent Communication in English both Speaking and Writing

You Think In Systems

You:

Understand tradeoffs between different state management approaches

Know how navigation design impacts long-term scalability

Care about code organization and structural clarity

Prefer thoughtful planning before execution

Avoid both over-engineering and short-term hacks

Are comfortable owning decisions without constant supervision


AI-Forward Engineering

We actively explore modern AI tools to increase engineering velocity and quality. AI fluency is not mandatory, but it is a strong advantage.

You:

Direct AI tools effectively

Review AI-generated code critically

What Success Looks Like

A codebase we feel confident building on for years

Job_Title: Technical Product Owner (App, E-commerce & LINE Platform)
Full_Description:
Role Summary

The Technical Product Owner drives digital applications, E-commerce platforms, and LINE-based platforms by aligning business goals with technical execution. This role focuses on delivering seamless customer journeys across mobile applications and E-commerce platforms, and LINE-based platforms (e.g., LINE LON).

The role manages product roadmap, Agile delivery, system integration, and operations while continuously improving user experience and business performance. This position is ideal for candidates with hands-on experience in digital product development, especially in application and E-commerce environments.

Key Responsibilities
1. Product & Technical Execution

Define and manage product roadmap for digital application, E-commerce website, and LINE-based platform (e.g., LINE LON)

Establish product vision and strategy based on market research, customer insights, and business needs

Collaborate closely with developers and cross-functional teams to deliver new features and enhancements

Drive improvements in key areas such as:

Agent Application (task assignment & sales tools)

E-commerce (checkout flow, payment, subscription)

LINE platform (customer engagement & conversion)

Work with UX/UI teams to ensure seamless and user-friendly digital experiences across all platforms

2. Product Delivery & Operation

Translate business requirements into user stories, acceptance criteria, and functional specifications

Lead Agile processes (Sprint planning, backlog grooming, release management)

Own end-to-end product delivery from concept → development → UAT → launch (PROD)

Prepare operational processes, training materials, user manuals, and FAQs

Coordinate with call center/service desk for post-launch support and incident resolution

Monitor product performance using KPIs such as revenue, conversion, customer acquisition, and engagement

3. Technical Collaboration & Integration

Identify and manage technical risks, dependencies, and system limitations

Support API design and system integration across applications, E-commerce, and LINE platform

Analyze system performance and user behavior to drive continuous improvement

4. Stakeholder Engagement & Data Analysis

Act as the bridge between business, tech, design, and stakeholders

Simplify complex technical concepts for non-technical audiences

Track and analyze product performance to improve conversion, engagement, and sales productivity

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree or higher in Business, IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related fields

At least 5 years of experience in Product Owner / Product Manager / Business Analyst roles with a track record of managing all stages of a product’s lifecycle

Proven experience in digital application development and E-commerce platforms (MUST)

Experience working with LINE platforms (e.g., LINE LON, LINE OA, LIFF) is highly preferred

Strong understanding of product lifecycle and Agile methodologies

Familiarity with APIs, system integration, and technical documentation

Experience with tools such as Jira, Confluence, Slack, Figma, or analytics platforms

Experience in payment systems, subscription models, CRM, or sales tools is a plus

Basic understanding of JavaScript frameworks is a plus

Certifications (CSPO, PSPO, PMP, etc.) are a plus

Good command of English  (both written and spoken) is a plus.

-การทำงานภายใต้แรงกดดัน: สามารถทำงานได้ดีภายใต้สภาวะกดดัน

We are looking for a highly motivated and skilled Product Owner to join our dynamic team and take charge of our e-commerce solutions. As the Product Owner, you will be the visionary and advocate for our e-commerce products and services, driving innovation and ensuring that our offerings meet the evolving needs of our customers and the market. You will be at the forefront of shaping the future of our e-commerce platform and driving its success.

Responsibilities:

Product Strategy: Develop and communicate a clear and compelling product vision and strategy for our e-commerce solutions, aligned with the company's overall goals and customer needs.

Market Research: Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends, gaps, creativity and opportunities in the e-commerce industry. Use data-driven insights to inform product decisions.

Product Roadmap: Create and maintain a well-defined product roadmap that outlines the prioritized features, enhancements, and updates for the e-commerce platform.

Requirements Gathering: Collaborate closely with stakeholders, including customers, internal teams, and senior management, to gather and document product requirements.

User Stories: Translate product requirements into clear and actionable user stories, working closely with the development team during the Agile/Scrum development process.

Product Backlog Management: Maintain and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring that it reflects the most valuable and feasible items for implementation.

Release Planning: Plan and coordinate product releases, taking into account dependencies, timelines, and customer impact.

Product Development Oversight: Work closely with the development team to ensure that product features are developed according to the defined requirements and are of the highest quality.

Customer Feedback: Act as the customer's voice, gathering feedback, conducting user testing, and incorporating insights to enhance the product's usability and customer experience.

Performance Tracking: Define and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess the success of the e-commerce solutions. Use data to make informed decisions and iterate on the product.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate with design, marketing, sales, and customer support teams to ensure a cohesive product strategy and consistent messaging.

Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Business, Computer Science, or a related field. Advanced degrees and relevant certifications are a plus.

Proven experience as a Product Owner or similar role in e-commerce or software development.

In-depth knowledge of e-commerce platforms, online shopping trends, and customer behavior in the e-commerce industry.

Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and product development processes.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a data-driven approach to decision-making.

Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities, capable of conveying product vision and requirements to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Demonstrated ability to prioritize and manage multiple projects simultaneously while adhering to deadlines.

Results-oriented mindset with a passion for delivering high-quality products that meet customer needs and drive business growth.

Adaptable and flexible to navigate a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.

Join our innovative and passionate team as a Product Owner and help shape the future of our e-commerce solutions. If you are a strategic thinker with a deep understanding of e-commerce and a passion for driving impactful products, we invite you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

We are seeking an SAP BTP Automation Consultant to lead the development of intelligent, integrated automation solutions. The ideal candidate will be an expert in SAP Build, capable of orchestrating complex scenarios that combine User-facing Forms, Approval Workflows, and RPA Bots. You will play a key role in transforming manual business processes into agile, automated digital experiences while maintaining a "Clean Core" for our SAP landscape.

Responsibilities

Integrated Automation Orchestration:

Design and implement End-to-End (E2E) automation lifecycles: from initial data capture via Digital Forms, through multi-level Approval Workflows, to final execution via RPA Bots.

Ensure seamless data hand-off and state management between Forms, Workflows, and Bots within the SAP Build unified environment.

Low-Code Form & UI Development:

Develop responsive Digital Forms (using SAP Build) to capture structured data from users, ensuring data validation and a superior user experience.

(Optional but preferred) Utilize SAP Build Apps to create more complex, custom front-end applications that trigger backend automation processes.

Workflow & Business Logic:

Configure sophisticated Workflow patterns, including parallel approvals, escalations, and deadline monitoring.

Embed Business Rules to automate conditional logic, ensuring the Workflow routes tasks or triggers RPA Bots based on real-time data.

Robotic Process Automation (RPA) Execution:

Develop Bots to perform the "heavy lifting" after a workflow is approved (e.g., data entry into legacy systems, mass updates in S/4HANA, or cross-system reconciliation).

Manage the Triggering Logic so that RPA bots are invoked automatically upon specific workflow events or statuses.

Integration & Security:

Connect the SAP Build ecosystem to SAP S/4HANA and third-party systems via OData/REST APIs and BTP Destinations.

Manage process security using BTP Role Collections to ensure only authorized users can access specific Forms or approve Workflows.




Technical Qualifications

Core Platform: Deep expertise in SAP Build Process Automation (the unified lobby for Forms, Workflows, and RPA).

Process Integration: Proven experience in linking Forms → Workflows → RPA in a single, cohesive project.

Scripting & Logic: Strong JavaScript skills for custom RPA scripting and data mapping between different process stages.

API Knowledge: Proficiency in consuming SAP Discovery Center APIs and managing BTP Destinations.

AI & Document Processing: Experience using AI Business Services (Document Information Extraction) to feed data directly from PDF/Images into the Form/Workflow stream.

Experience with SAP Build Work Zone to host the Forms and Workflows in a unified digital workplace.

Understanding of Event-Driven Architecture (SAP Event Mesh) to trigger automations based on real-time business events.
